meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master this advanced client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver enterprise-grade performance at freelancer speed.
content.answer_block: To break past basic app limitations, transition from manual coding to an AI-orchestrated workflow. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you can automate boilerplate, enforce architectural patterns, and deliver production-ready SaaS features in half the time, ensuring your client projects remain highly scalable.
content.intro:
You’ve been here before: the project starts with excitement, but quickly devolves into a slog of repetitive boilerplate and brittle spaghetti code. You’re shipping 'basic' apps that function, but they lack the polish and architectural integrity that separates a high-ticket freelancer from the rest of the pack. The clock is ticking, the client is asking for features you aren't sure how to implement, and your profit margin is evaporating into technical debt.

It doesn't have to be this way. The secret to scaling your freelance business isn't working more hours; it's upgrading your cognitive stack. By leveraging the precision of Claude Code and the structural scaffolding of Antigravity, you can transform your development process into an automated, high-velocity engine. This is how you reclaim your time, delight your clients, and stop feeling stuck in the cycle of building subpar software.

steps.title: Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation. Use Antigravity to generate a modular directory structure that enforces separation of concerns from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 14 project with Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, and a clean domain-driven design directory structure. Include a core/services folder and a types/shared folder.

steps.title: State Logic Injection
steps.description: Automate the creation of complex state management hooks to ensure your UI is reactive and performant without manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a custom React hook for managing global authentication state and user session persistence using Zustand, ensuring type safety and error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create zustand store for auth with persistence"

steps.title: API Layer Implementation
steps.description: Standardize your client-server communication using automated API route generation based on your defined schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD API route for a 'Project' entity using Next.js App Router, incorporating Zod validation and Prisma integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate api routes for project schema"

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Don't ship without confidence. Generate unit tests for your critical business logic automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Vitest unit tests for the core business logic services generated in the previous step, covering edge cases and error states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "write unit tests for service layer"

steps.title: Refinement and Optimization
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a final audit of your codebase, looking for performance bottlenecks and security vulnerabilities.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for potential performance improvements, focusing on unnecessary re-renders and inefficient database queries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "audit for performance and security issues"

pro_tips: Always define your Zod schemas before generating code; it acts as the 'source of truth' for both Antigravity and your database layer.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep track of client-specific coding standards across multiple different projects.
Force AI to write 'self-documenting' code by explicitly adding a constraint to your prompts requiring JSDoc comments for every exported function.
Automate your deployment pipeline within Claude Code by integrating GitHub Actions templates early in the scaffold stage.
When stuck on a bug, use the 'claude ask' command to explain the architectural intent behind the code, rather than just pasting the error message.
content.next_steps: Once your first modular project is live, start building a custom library of 'Antigravity Blueprints' specific to your niche, so you can spin up new client projects in under 30 minutes.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the code and start mastering the workflow. Elevate your freelance output to enterprise standards today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
